Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES

Title: Relates to residential transition conferences and the placement of persons with developmental disabilities
Summary: Requires covered operators to provide written notice of pending placement of persons with developmental disabilities to interested parties; specifies who may be considered an interested party; provides that a residential transition conference shall be held between the interested parties after notice has been given of the proposed placement to discuss the proposal.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the mental hygiene law, in relation to residential transition conferences and the placement of persons with developmental disabilities
